priority_basis: R-037 explicitly handed off script-restriction classification after the default-ignorable gate. Recent commits contained no independent restriction-level classifier, making this the highest-priority non-duplicative frontier gap.
finding: Unicode restriction level is an independent detection result over profile eligibility and augmented script sets; it is neither syntax validity nor proof of benign intent.

verification.scope: byte-identical pre-commit module and test files

handoff: Parse and authenticate Unicode 17.0.0 Scripts.txt and ScriptExtensions.txt, derive augmented script sets per scalar, bind Recommended-script membership to the same version, then integrate restrictionLevel into the authenticated admission inspection result without making it mutate the registry.
shared_state_policy: Additive owned queue-update record only; canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
